articles.title_en: Long queues seen at fuel pumps in Madhya Pradesh districts; Minister denies shortage
articles.title_hi: Long queues seen at fuel pumps in Madhya Pradesh districts; Minister denies shortage
articles.summary_en: Vehicle queues are seen in various districts, including Indore, Ujjain, Mandsaur, Shajapur, and Jhabua, in recent online footage. The images show extended lines of vehicles, causing traffic congestion. Local authorities have not yet commented on the matter.
